g.text: Ground Truth Export for Recall Measurement
Dataset Size | Dim | k | Queries | Time
Note: Generation is O(N × Q × dim)
• Generate once, reuse for all experiments
• Use same random seed for reproducibility
• Store queries separately for large datasets
• Compress JSON with gzip for large files
• Version ground truth with index snapshots
